title: Comments should not contain sensitive information
description: This rule checks for comments that match a specific regular expression pattern, which typically includes sensitive information like API keys, passwords, or other secrets.

noncompliant.code: my_api_key = '1234567890' # Do not commit this api key!
noncompliant.description: A comment containing an API key

compliant.description: A variable without sensitive information in the comment

why_is_this_an_issue: Sensitive information in comments can be disclosed and misused.

metadata.title: Comments should not contain sensitive information
